# External Image Source Map

This folder stores local copies of images used by:

- `/public/featured-experiences.html`
- `/public/mandarin-camp.html`

## Mapping

- `featured_hero.jpg`
  - source: `https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1541339907198-e08756dedf3f?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=1920`
